summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ConstructionConnection app with 3D globe background. Tested both desktop and mobile views extensively. All major features working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Hero subtitle shows 'CONSTRUCTION CONNECTION' in all caps instead of normal case
Equipment search selector not found during automated testing
Emergent badge overlay occasionally blocks tab clicks

passed_tests: 3D animated globe background renders and animates correctly
Desktop hero section with correct 'Building the World, One Landmark at a Time' text
Desktop navigation bar with Projects, Services, About, Contact links working
Desktop stats section with animated counters (500+ projects, 40+ countries, etc.)
Desktop map section with 'Our Worldwide Presence' heading displays correctly
Desktop map filter buttons (All, Projects, Equipment) all clickable and functional
Google Maps placeholder shows correctly when API key not configured
Mobile responsive layout switches correctly at 768px breakpoint
Mobile bottom navigation tabs (Home, Equipment, Projects, Messages, Profile) all accessible
Mobile Feed tab shows posts with country flags (US, Nigeria, etc.)
Mobile Equipment tab shows rental listings with filters
Mobile Projects tab shows project cards with progress bars
Mobile Messages tab accessible with conversation interface
Mobile Profile tab accessible with settings
Mobile search functionality working in Feed, Equipment, and Projects tabs
Mobile filter systems working (Global, Residential, Commercial, Infrastructure)
Mobile stats display (42 countries, 186K workers, 12.4K projects, 8.2K equipment)
All interactive buttons and navigation elements clickable
CSS-based 3D globe animations working without WebGL dependencies
Responsive design works perfectly between desktop and mobile views
